creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
While running portmaster --no-confirm -afgv, the following happened:

===>  Installing for icingaweb2-2.4.1_1
===>  Checking if icingaweb2 already installed
===>   Registering installation for icingaweb2-2.4.1_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/workdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/icingaweb2/apache/icingaweb2.conf:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/workdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/icingaweb2/nginx/icingaweb2.conf:No such file or directory

Ports tree is at r435758.

net-mgmt/icingaweb2 is configured as follows:

===> The following configuration options are available for icingaweb2-2.4.1_1:
     LDAP=off: LDAP protocol support
     MYSQL=off: MySQL database support
     NLS=off: Native Language Support
     PDF=on: Export graphs as PDF
     PGSQL=on: PostgreSQL database support
